content:
Pluto in Pisces: Meaning, Traits & Crystals

Pluto in Pisces blends the archetypal drive of Pluto (where you transform, face power and shadow, and regenerate) with the Water, mutable nature of Pisces.

  • Planet: Pluto — transformation, power, death-rebirth, depth, obsession
  • Sign: Pisces (Water/Mutable) — dreams, compassion, mysticism, surrender, imagination
